step_by_step_thinking: I agree that option B, "single crown and bridge cement-retained," might be preferable due to its ability to provide immediate function while accommodating necessary adjustments following implant integration. However, an additional consideration could be the long-term stability and maintenance requirements; overdentures offer excellent retention without relying solely on screws, which can sometimes fail over time if not properly maintained. Nonetheless, given the need for early functionality and adjustability, this approach remains highly appropriate.
